/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/adu_json.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libadu_json.so -o libadu_json.so CMakeFiles/adu_json.dir/adu_json_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adu_json.dir/adu_json.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Xml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
